title: 山村貞子 | Yamamura Sadako
description: A horror mod. Based on "The Ring".
body:
**Notice: The mod might be buggy, especially 1.20.1 and 1.21.1 versions. Mod is in BETA stage, but will receive updates at least until the release.

[Community Discord can be found here !11!!11!](https://discord.com/invite/79SkcjdZcZ)**


**Mod was made for SpookyJam 2025. Directed by Alfo, coded by itszhaba.**

Mod adds a curse, named Yamamura Sadako. Her main goal is to scare the player in some interesting ways, starting from basic stalking mechanic and ending by complete cutscenes.
Sadako appears as a young woman whose face is hidden under her long black hair, and she wears a white dress that has water stains on it, which is also frayed at the end.
Also the curse has different stages, which will progress as you play the mod.

**If you find any issues or bugs, let me know on the community Discord server.**


Some kind of credits:

Me | Coding, most of the animations

Alfo | Modeling, textures, some of the ideas


Luh FaQ:

There are no ports for another versions / modloaders / editions planned.

Mod has a config file where u can change the spawnrate.

Mod requires Geckolib.
